code: import{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Login(_ref){let{onLogin}=_ref;const[usuario,setUsuario]=useState('');const[senha,setSenha]=useState('');const[erro,setErro]=useState(false);function entrar(){if(usuario==='admin'&&senha==='123'){onLogin();}else{setErro(true);setSenha('');}}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login-bg",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login-icon",children:"\uD83D\uDCDE"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"login-titulo",children:"Contatos dos Alunos"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-sub",children:"Fa\xE7a login para acessar o sistema"}),erro&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login-erro",children:"\u274C Usu\xE1rio ou senha incorretos!"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"login-label",children:"Usu\xE1rio"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"login-input",placeholder:"Digite o usu\xE1rio",value:usuario,onChange:e=>setUsuario(e.target.value),onKeyDown:e=>e.key==='Enter'&&entrar()}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"login-label",children:"Senha"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"login-input",type:"password",placeholder:"Digite a senha",value:senha,onChange:e=>setSenha(e.target.value),onKeyDown:e=>e.key==='Enter'&&entrar()}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"login-btn",onClick:entrar,children:"\uD83D\uDD13 Entrar"})]})});}
